title: Bridge Essay: Effect of Meditation on Heart Rate Variability

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception, heart-brain axis, visceral perception.
